name: Barbell Hip Thrust
form_cues: Upper back on the bench, feet flat, knees ~90° at the top
Tuck chin, ribs down — no lumbar hyperextension
Drive through heels, squeeze glutes hard at lockout
Use a bar pad — the bar across your hips will hurt without one
notes: Use the bar pad PF provides. Roll the bar over your hips before lying back. Start light to dial form.
video_id_query: Barbell hip thrust proper form Bret Contreras
instructions: Sit on the floor with your upper back against a bench, feet flat shoulder-width.
Roll a loaded barbell (with a pad) over your hips. Grip the bar lightly to keep it stable.
Brace core, tuck chin slightly. Drive through your heels, pushing your hips up until your torso is parallel to the floor.
At the top: knees ~90°, glutes squeezed hard, ribs down. Don't arch the lower back to gain height.
Lower under control until your hips are just above the floor, then drive back up.
